args:
set -eu
bundle_dir=$(mktemp -d)
cargo run --quiet --bin sock -- build --out "$bundle_dir" --backend-family cuda-graphs --readiness performance >/dev/null
grep -q '"name":"decode_attention"' "$bundle_dir/buildplan.json"
if grep -q 'prefill_attention' "$bundle_dir/buildplan.json"; then
  echo 'unexpected prefill scope in backend-scoped buildplan' >&2
  exit 1
fi
printf 'backend-scoped-build\n'
